# AI Unfiltered - Full Article List

> This file contains recent AI news articles for consumption by LLMs and AI agents.
> Updated every 4 hours. Links to original sources.


## 2026-07-04

### 74 Yuan for 3 Hours: Embodied AI Robots Begin Entering Chinese Homes for Household Chores
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/embodied-ai-robots-household-chores-74-yuan-china-jul2026
- Summary: China's embodied AI robots are now available for hire at homes for as low as 74 yuan for 3 hours, sparking debate on the real value of billion-dollar embodied AI investments.

### Hema SuperheSuan NB Enters Beijing as Alibaba and Meituan Clash in Hard Discount Retail Race
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/hema-superhesuan-nb-beijing-alibaba-meituan-hard-discount-retail-jul2026
- Summary: Alibaba's Hema SuperheSuan NB opens 6 stores in Beijing on the same day as Meituan's Happy Monkey opens 7 stores across cities, escalating hard discount retail competition.

### Alibaba DAMO Academy's ElementsClaw AI Agent Discovers 4 New Superconductors in Just 28 GPU Hours
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/alibaba-damo-elementsclaw-ai-superconductors-28-gpu-hours-jul2026
- Summary: Alibaba DAMO Academy's AI agent ElementsClaw finds 4 previously unknown superconductors, screening 2.4M crystal structures in 28 GPU hours.

### Kuaishou Spins Off Kling AI With $3B Funding Round, Tencent Alibaba and Baidu Join as Investors
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/kuaishou-kling-ai-spin-off-3-billion-funding-jul2026
- Summary: Kuaishou spins off its Kling AI video generation unit with $3B funding at $18B valuation; Tencent, Alibaba Cloud, and Baidu participate as investors.

### Grounding LLM Reasoning under Incomplete Graph Evidence
- Source: HF Daily Papers
- Category: open-source
